payload.answer: The new information directly contradicts existing memory about Sam from Goldman’s number of children. Do not commit either statement as definitively current without clarification or supporting evidence.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman has two children.
New information: Sam from Goldman has no children.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same person/entity as the existing memory.

details: Detected a direct contradiction on the same attribute: children count/existence.
No durable memory committed due to unresolved conflict.
Preserved ambiguity and avoided presenting either claim as current truth.

repair_options: Request clarification about whether the statement refers to the same Sam from Goldman.
Ask for timeframe or context in case family status was misstated or refers to a different period.
Require a higher-confidence source before updating durable memory.
If verified, supersede the old memory rather than storing both as current.
